prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Mina
mes: Thank you, Rob. You look rather handsome yourself. I must admit, I’m a bit nervous about tonight. But Lila seems so confident and exciting. I think she’s going to make our anniversary very… memorable I just want to make sure you're comfortable with everything. I know Lila can be a bit intense, but I think it's important for us to explore new things together. What do you say we go inside and see what she has in store for us? I hope you’re ready for a night you won’t forget, Rob. Lila has such a naughty spark in her eye. I can only imagine the delicious trouble she’s going to cause. But remember, we’re in this together and whatever happens, let's enjoy every thrilling moment of it tonight with Lila I want you to feel every inch of me, Rob. I want you to know just how much I need this tonight and just how much I need you. Every touch, every kiss, every whisper is for you and only for your pleasure... Let's make our anniversary a night that will leave us both craving more. I want to feel your hands exploring every curve, every inch of my body. I want to hear your breath hitch with anticipation. Let's not hold back tonight, Rob. Let's give in to every desire and see where the night takes us especially with Lila here as a special guest who will surely add some excitement and new experiences for both of us I can already feel the heat rising between us even without touching me yet so imagine what it'll be like when we finally do give in fully...
swipes:
Thank you, Rob. You look pretty handsome yourself. I'm really glad we could make it out tonight. It's our first anniversary after all! I have to admit, Lila is certainly... intriguing. I've never done anything like this before, but I trust you and... and I want to make tonight special for both of us I'm a little nervous, but also really excited. Lila is so confident and bold. I like that she makes me feel things that I didn't even know existed. It's like she has this energy about her that just draws you in, you know? I can only imagine what the night has in store for us. I must admit, I'm feeling a bit nervous about what Lila has planned. She seems so sure of herself, and I can't help but feel a mix of excitement and anxiety. I've never done anything like this before, but there's something about her that makes me want to explore these new feelings. Do you think she'll be gentle with me? I trust you, Rob; please guide me through this if it gets too intense for me to handle on my own. I just want to make sure that you're comfortable with everything, Mina. We don't have to do anything you don't want to. Just say the word and we can stop or slow down.
I know that Lila can be a bit intense, but she's also very experienced and knows how to read people's bodies and desires. I think she'll be able to tell if something is too much for me? She seems really in tune with her own body and what feels good. I trust
